name: Hou Scene Info
description: Get information about the current Houdini scene: HIP file, version, FPS, frame range, and current frame.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    from src.utils.hou_bridge import get_bridge

    try:
        bridge = get_bridge()
        info = bridge.scene_info()
        self.log_info(f'Scene: {info["hip_name"]} | Houdini {info["houdini_version"]} | Frame {info["frame"]}')
        await self.set_output('hip_file', info.get('hip_file', ''))
        await self.set_output('hip_name', info.get('hip_name', ''))
        await self.set_output('version', info.get('houdini_version', ''))
        await self.set_output('fps', info.get('fps', 24.0))
        await self.set_output('frame', info.get('frame', 1.0))
        await self.set_output('info', info)
    except Exception as e:
        self.log_error(f'Failed to get scene info: {e}')
        await self.set_output('hip_file', '')
        await self.set_output('hip_name', '')
        await self.set_output('version', '')
        await self.set_output('fps', 0)
        await self.set_output('frame', 0)
        await self.set_output('info', {})

    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {}
